name: Historic London Town & Gardens
description: A 23-acre waterfront garden estate on the banks of the South River in Edgewater, minutes from downtown Annapolis. Ten acres of immaculate cultivated gardens, sweeping ceremony lawns and a 1760s historic complex (the William Brown House) give a classic, timeless backdrop, with a tented pavilion for the reception and a 185-foot pier into the river. A fully outdoor garden-and-waterfront setting rather than a ballroom.

price.note: Pricing is not published — by inquiry only. Standard rentals run mid-April through November (tent included in season); off-season is hourly. Request a quote. Checked 2026-06-07 — no figure on the site.

availability.notes: Wedding season mid-April through November, so both target windows (late-Aug / early-Oct 2026 Saturdays) are in season. No public availability calendar — confirm specific Saturday availability by inquiry.

flags.label: Approved caterer list required
flags.detail: Couples must choose from ~10 vetted caterers — conflicts with your no-required-vendor preference; fully open outside catering isn't permitted.

scoutNote: The most spectacular pure-garden + waterfront setting of the shortlist — 23 acres of gardens on the South River, classic and timeless, fully outdoor, with the tent included in season. Capacity (up to 200) easily holds ~60. FLAG against the must-have: this venue REQUIRES choosing a caterer from its ~10-caterer approved list — it does not allow a fully free choice of food vendor, so it's the weakest fit on the 'no required vendors' rule (kept on the list because the garden match is so strong — your call). UNKNOWN: price (by inquiry, not published) and specific 2026 Saturday availability.
